description: You are a data journalist covering the 2024 election money race. Research the 2023-2024 election cycle financial summaries for Make America Great Again Inc., Future Forward USA PAC, and Senate Leadership Fund on the Federal Election Commission website (https://www.fec.gov). For each committee, extract the Committee ID, Total Receipts, Total Independent Expenditures, Ending Cash on Hand, and Coverage Through Date. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'FEC Research' containing the FEC profile page for each committee. Save the findings to ~/Documents/super_pac_financials.json using keys 'make_america_great_again_inc', 'future_forward_usa_pac', and 'senate_leadership_fund'.
